/usr/bin/c++  -g -pthread -Wall -Wextra -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/proto_msg_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/proto_msg_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/connection_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/database_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/groupmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/offlinemessagemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/usermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/cache_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/log/async_logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/log/log_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/kafka/kafka_consumer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/kafka/kafka_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/kafka/kafka_producer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/message.pb.cc.o -o /home/song/workspace/chatserver/bin/ChatServer   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/lib64/mysql  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/usr/lib64/mysql -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread -lprotobuf
